name: ∆lice (Sudden turn of events) [FPE DARK TIME AU]
description:
THE POLICE HAD BEEN CALLED...

HIDE

SCENARIO

The power had failed almost instantly, plunging every hallway, classroom, and stairwell into a suffocating black void where even emergency lights refused to flicker on. The air felt heavier, thicker — like the building itself knew something was terribly wrong.

The teachers were the first to die.
